name: claude_skills_prompts
description: Reusable prompt pack derived from the claude_skills capability.

prompts.name: code_generation_prompt
prompts.template: Generate code to perform the following task: {task_description}
prompts.use_case: Automated code generation and refactoring across multiple AI coding assistants

prompts.name: marketing_advice_prompt
prompts.use_case: Providing marketing strategy recommendations and product management insights via AI agents

prompts.name: compliance_check_prompt
prompts.template: Check the following process for regulatory compliance: {process_description}
prompts.use_case: Ensuring compliance and regulatory adherence through automated advisory plugins

prompts.name: product_management_prompt
prompts.template: Analyze the product requirements and suggest improvements: {requirements_details}
prompts.use_case: Facilitating C-level decision support with tailored executive advice integrated in coding environments

prompts.name: c_level_advisory_prompt
prompts.template: Advise on the following executive decision: {decision_context}
